name: Let Free the Curse of Taekwondo
overview: Do-hoe, a high schooler disillusioned by his father's violent Taekwondo gym, forms a bond with Ju-young, but their connection is strained by family pressure. Ten years later, they reunite.

trailers.title: BIFAN 2024 | 태권도의 저주를 풀어줘 Let Free the Curse of Taekwondo Trailer
